reviews.review_title: 完成度の高い野球ゲームだけど改善が必要
reviews.review_description:
Totally Baseball Review (Feedback & Suggestions)

The core baseball mechanics are very well designed, and overall the game feels highly polished. It’s one of the best VR baseball experiences out there. However, there are a few areas that could be improved.

First, the CPU behavior needs work, especially in base running. The decision-making often feels unintelligent, and the overall balance is off — the player’s running speed feels too fast, while the CPU feels too slow. Also, not being able to manually control stolen bases is frustrating; if that feature can’t be improved, it might be better to remove it.

For pitching, the split-finger fastball feels too strong compared to other pitches. It would be better to either reduce its movement or slightly lower its speed for better balance.

In terms of fielding, when slow motion is turned off, throws become so fast that it’s almost impossible to catch the ball after warping. Adjusting the warp timing to be faster would make fielding smoother and more playable.

As for additional features, fielding is very enjoyable, so it’s a shame that there’s no way to practice it in training mode. Adding a fielding practice option would greatly improve the experience. A tournament-style mode would also be a great addition to increase replayability.

Overall, this is an incredibly well-made VR baseball game, and I hope the developers continue to improve and support it.

reviews.review_title: A review from a OG (A honest review)

after playing this game for five years, it's still pretty good. I like everything that they've done to it, multiplayer still not terrible and can be pretty competitive and fun. hitting is 50-50, sometimes it's easy sometimes it  just doesn't work,￼ but i like that. pitching and fielding are simply just fun and can be satisfying.

my only issue is how repetitive the gameplay is.￼￼￼￼￼ I know it's hard to implement new things into your game, it's easier said than done, but I feel like adding or creating things could be done even in smaller patches, but I'm not a game developer so I wouldn't understand.

i'm still having a blast with this game though and it's still probably my go to game.￼￼

One thing I would recommend now is just some kind of realism mode on single player

The hit box on the glove is smaller, the ball no longer has that green trail￼￼, the AI is smarter on the bases and are faster,  plays are tougher to make, smaller strike zone and lastly, pitching is faster and harder to hit. if you feel the need to add its own hitting difficulty. ￼

reviews.review_title: Great game but a few problems
reviews.review_description: The game is genuinely amazing however I have a few suggestions that I would love to be heard out on. First of all, once you really get into the groove of the game, it gets too easy. Making the teams difficulty slightly dynamic would really help players retention and length of playing. Another suggestion is to help the players manual pitching. I like to manually pitch to feed my own ego, but sometimes it’s just so difficult. A real problem I have is when I’m batting and it kinda stops me and shows a red sign telling me to keep the bat in the tracking area. Another problem is when players are stealing against me, I will catch the ball and try to throw it over them and to the infielder at the other base, but sometimes other players on my team will get in the way and catch it, giving up a stolen base. There are also times when I am batting but I spawn in the middle of the batting box and can’t hit anything. Adding a type of career or franchise mode in the game would be so fun. I would also like to end this review by saying that I sincerely enjoy this game, and will support the dev team and recommend this game to others always, unless they completely change the game for the worst, which will likely never happen. Thanks.

developer_response.body: This is a really great review and we appreciate how thorough it is! It has been forwarded to the Devs!

reviews.review_title: I like it, but it needs work.
reviews.review_description:
I like playing it, but the glitches make me real upset. I have had strikes be counted as balls, strikes not be counted at all, every time I have thrown a slow ball the CPU hits a home run, and I've hit balls that went to the wall, and the CPU stands between bases, which means it only stays on 2nd and not 3rd or even home.

There is also balancing, I've hit balls that in real life baseball would be good, but because of how the ball works and catching works, it either gets caught when its like 5 feet above shortstop, or someone in the outfield can just stand still and hold their glove up. And why is the CPUs running speed when going to bases so slow? It gets real annoying after a while of having to rely on home runs for points only, which has its own problems with balls being counted as fouls when not in the foul zone, the ball literally going through my bat, and balls being counted as strikes when outside the strike zone. Also, sometimes the CPU starts running to the next base without the ball even being hit, or after it went into the foul zone it keeps trying to go to the next base.

One of the worst parts is that the CPU has instant reaction time, unlike actual people, aka, the player.

developer_response.body: We appreciate this thorough and helpful review! We try and keep the game as similar to real life dynamics in baseball so the points you are making are definitely going to be taken into consideration!

reviews.review_description: The single player mode runs perfectly fine there are no issues that have occurred.Multiplayer on the other hand has many issues. The game just doesn’t run well overall in multiplayer. If these issues can be fixed my rating would go up to a 5. But again these issues almost make multiplayer unplayable.

developer_response.body: We are always working on improving the game and we are currently working on a multiplayer overhaul, adding new VS options for multiplayer as well!

reviews.review_title: Fun VR baseball! Hope for future updates
reviews.review_description:
This is a rare VR baseball game that is quite good. I have a few update ideas to throw out there, but I understand devs can only do so much with each update. 

1) Smooth Turning - Snap turning feels unnatural for me in most games (smooth turning would also be great in Totally Basketball!) and I don't have a ton of space to always be rotating in place, though that part is on me.

2) Season mode with statistics and lineups (AVG, HR, RBI, etc.)

3) Coop multiplayer vs. bot teams - it'd be great to team up with friend to play CPU teams (alternate every batter)

4) "Road to the show" career mode - a dream mode, but I know this would take so much work.

Thanks for making a cool vr baseball game! Wish there were more like this.

developer_response.body: Thank you! These are some great ideas that we are definitely looking into adding in the future!

reviews.review_description: I love this game, it has good mechanics for throwing and hitting. The only thing I think should be added is more game modes. For example; there should be a fielding practice mode, and i couls be fun if the was an umpire mode, just some thoughts but great job!!

developer_response.body: We do not currently have a fielding practice mode.  We have batting and pitching practice but we will take this suggestion into account! We also know the high demand for an Umpire mode!

reviews.review_description: Literally got a homerun with one runner on, was walking to second base and somehow got thrown out. Ended what would have been a leading homerun.

developer_response.body: In single player, its possible to think you hit a homerun just because it gets close to the fence, but that isn't a homerun. A lot of people also ignore the alarm and think they can run off the base line on a homerun, which can out them. It is also good to check if you have the "Run bases" option disabled as you might think you are being outed when you aren't and are being returned to home and scored.

reviews.review_title: They need to add more and fix the game.
reviews.review_description: Add more modes like, hitting practice, fielding practice, pitching practice, and umpiring. They need to add more teams like Louisiana crawfish. They also need to add more games like carrier mode, season, tournament, playoff, scrimmage, and championship. They need to add more pitches like knuckle ball and knuckle curve. They need to add more things to customize your player and remove the buying process. They need to fix the pitching for example, I pitch 3 strikes in a row and it only counts two. The accuracy of pitching sucks. They need to fix the tagging for example I’m running about to get an inside the park home run and I get tagged while I’m standing on the home base. That’s all thanks for reading and please make this come true.

developer_response.body: Hey there! This sounds like a tracking issue.  The tracking system is not perfect and it is possible to swing faster than it can track, resulting in a bunt and when you swing slower, it tracks the entire time, resulting in a proper swing that yields a homerun.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the support! We avg a new update about once a month! We add things the community suggests, we add new customizer items, and polish things we've gotten feedback on.  Things like Multiplayer, Special Pitches, Bat Flipping, Choose Your Own Position Mode, have all part of us constantly updating! Let us know on Discord what you'd like to see -and about your issue with Foul balls, can you send a video?  You might just be getting a normal foul ball, there are tall poles on the sides and you can't be on the outside of those poles for it to count as a homerun.

developer_response.body: We have multiple locomotion options in the game and it sounds like you may be set to armswing locomotion and trying to use the controls for smooth locomotion.  You can change this option in the options menu.  You can also find details on how to use these different locomotion styles and test them out in the locker room during the opening menu sequence if you don't skip it.  As for pitching, we have a pitching practice mode and different pitching assist levels as well as a cannon to replace manual throwing.  Try out the cannon and different assist levels in the Pitching Practice mode.
